name: poutine
description: Federated music player - merges personal music collections into a unified library

scripts.build: pnpm --filter hub build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter hub test && pnpm --filter frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter hub lint && pnpm --filter frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter hub typecheck && pnpm --filter frontend typecheck
scripts.preversion: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then echo "pnpm version must run on main (current: $branch)" >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add hub/package.json frontend/package.json hub/src/version.ts
